_meta.description: Opinionated default configurations for Oxlint and Oxfmt. Only includes values that differ from tool defaults. Conditional sections are applied based on project dependencies.

oxlint._comment: Oxlint default: only 'correctness' category enabled with 'warn'. This config promotes correctness to error and enables additional categories.

plugins._comment: Default plugins: eslint, typescript, unicorn, oxc. Add import always; react/jsx-a11y only if React is in deps.

env._comment: Default: { builtin: true }. Add browser and es6 for web projects.

oxfmt._comment: Only non-default values. Oxfmt defaults: printWidth 100, tabWidth 2, useTabs false, semi true, singleQuote false, trailingComma all, bracketSpacing true, arrowParens always, endOfLine lf, sortPackageJson true.

oxfmt_ifTailwind._comment: Apply when tailwindcss is in project dependencies. Sorts Tailwind utility classes in className, class, and common helper functions.
